sentences.target: Ce plat est sain pour nous.

translations.fr: Ce plat est sain pour nous.
translations.en: This dish is healthy for us.
translations.es: Este plato es saludable para nosotros.
translations.de: Dieses Gericht ist gesund für uns.
translations.it: Questo piatto è sano per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这道菜对我们的健康有益。
translations.yue: 呢個餸對我哋嘅健康有益。
translations.pt: Este prato é saudável para nós.
translations.vi: Món này tốt cho sức khỏe của chúng ta.
translations.nl: Dit gerecht is gezond voor ons.
translations.hi: यह व्यंजन हमारे लिए सेहतमंद है.
translations.pl: To danie jest dla nas zdrowe.
translations.el: Αυτό το πιάτο είναι υγιεινό για εμάς.
translations.nb: Denne retten er sunn for oss.
translations.sv: Den här rätten är nyttig för oss.
translations.ro: Acest fel de mâncare este sănătos pentru noi.
translations.cs: Toto jídlo je pro nás zdravé.
translations.da: Denne ret er sund for os.
translations.ja: この料理は私たちにとって健康的です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies the subject noun 'plat' (deictic specification).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate complement agreeing with 'plat'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional phrase 'pour nous' expressing beneficiary.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.it: La tua routine ora è sana.
translations.vi: Thói quen của bạn bây giờ lành mạnh.
translations.el: Η ρουτίνα σου τώρα είναι υγιεινή.
translations.ja: あなたのルーティンは今は健康的です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'routine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, feminine singular; predicate complement agreeing with 'routine'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating the time frame.

sentences.target: Ces fruits sont sains pour le goûter.
sentences.reading: /se fʁɥi sɔ̃ sɛ̃ puʁ lə ɡute/

translations.fr: Ces fruits sont sains pour le goûter.
translations.ipa: /se fʁɥi sɔ̃ sɛ̃ puʁ lə ɡute/
translations.en: These fruits are healthy for snack time.
translations.es: Estas frutas son saludables para la merienda.
translations.de: Diese Früchte sind gesund als Snack.
translations.it: Questa frutta è sana per la merenda.
translations.ko: 이 과일은 간식 시간에 건강에 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些水果作为加餐很健康。
translations.yue: 呢啲生果作為點心好健康。
translations.pt: Estas frutas são saudáveis para o lanche.
translations.vi: Những loại trái cây này tốt cho bữa ăn nhẹ.
translations.ar: هذه الفواكه صحية لوقت الوجبة الخفيفة.
translations.nl: Deze vruchten zijn gezond als tussendoortje.
translations.hi: ये फल नाश्ते के लिए सेहतमंद हैं.
translations.pl: Te owoce są zdrowe na przekąskę.
translations.el: Αυτά τα φρούτα είναι υγιεινά για κολατσιό.
translations.nb: Disse fruktene er sunne som mellommåltid.
translations.sv: De här frukterna är nyttiga som mellanmål.
translations.ro: Aceste fructe sunt sănătoase pentru gustare.
translations.cs: Toto ovoce je zdravé na svačinu.
translations.da: Disse frugter er sunde som mellemmåltid.
translations.ja: これらの果物はおやつにするのに健康的です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'fruits'.
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person plural present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine plural; predicate complement agreeing with 'fruits'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating purpose/occasion.
Definite article, masculine singular; modifies 'goûter'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'pour' (the afternoon snack).

sentences.target: Je veux une vie saine cette année.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø yn vi sɛn sɛt ane/

translations.fr: Je veux une vie saine cette année.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø yn vi sɛn sɛt ane/
translations.en: I want a healthy life this year.
translations.es: Quiero una vida saludable este año.
translations.de: Ich will dieses Jahr ein gesundes Leben.
translations.ko: 나는 올해 건강한 삶을 살고 싶어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今年想过健康的生活。
translations.yue: 我今年想過健康嘅生活。
translations.ru: В этом году я хочу вести здоровый образ жизни.
translations.pt: Eu quero uma vida saudável neste ano.
translations.tr: Bu yıl sağlıklı bir yaşam istiyorum.
translations.vi: Năm nay tôi muốn một cuộc sống lành mạnh.
translations.nl: Dit jaar wil ik een gezond leven.
translations.uk: Цього року я хочу вести здорове життя.
translations.hi: मैं इस साल स्वस्थ जीवन जीना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: W tym roku chcę prowadzić zdrowe życie.
translations.nb: I år vil jeg ha et sunt liv.
translations.id: Tahun ini saya ingin menjalani hidup sehat.
translations.sv: I år vill jag leva ett hälsosamt liv.
translations.ro: Anul acesta vreau o viață sănătoasă.
translations.da: I år vil jeg leve et sundt liv.
translations.fi: Tänä vuonna haluan elää terveellistä elämää.
translations.ja: 今年は健康的な生活をしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes a direct object noun phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'vie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'veux'.
Adjective, feminine singular; attributive modifier of 'vie'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'année' in a temporal noun phrase used adverbially.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal noun phrase functioning as an adverbial ('this year').
